title: FormatTemporalPlainTime<{min,max}>
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatTemporalPlainTime<{min,max}> (a Temporal.PlainTime branded with a time-of-day range); the bounds constrain validation only, so the PlainTime serializes exactly like an unbranded one — toJSON() "HH:mm:ss" string in JSON, restored via Temporal.PlainTime.from().
notes: Branded Temporal.PlainTime: serialization uses the base Temporal kind (brand is validation-only); JSON carries the plain-time string and restores via .from().
